summary: Code review verification of 6 bug fixes in Protein Planner v2 meal planning flow. All 5 reported fixes have been correctly implemented in the code. Frontend loads correctly. Unable to perform E2E functional testing due to external n8n webhook API dependency.

minor.issue: External n8n webhook API - unable to verify functional behavior (previous test found empty responses)

integration_issues.issue: Cannot functionally test SWAP logic, button disabling, and rounding fixes - requires n8n API responses to render ProductCardGrid and PortionConfirmCard components

P1_ProductCardGrid_SWAP_logic.fix_applied: handleProductSelect implements SWAP logic - removes existing selection from same category before adding new
P1_ProductCardGrid_SWAP_logic.code_snippet: const filtered = prev.filter(n => { const p = (data.products || []).find(prod => prod.product_name === n); return p?.category !== category; }); return [...filtered, productName];

P1_Pick1_label.fix_applied: 'Pick 1' label appears above each category group in ProductCardGrid

P2_SelectThese_button_disables.fix_applied: submitted state added, button disabled after click, shows loading state
P2_SelectThese_button_disables.code_snippet: const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false); ... disabled={selected.length === 0 || submitted} loading={submitted}

P2_floating_point_rounding.fix_applied: All protein values use Math.round(value * 10) / 10 or toFixed(1)
P2_floating_point_rounding.code_snippet: const total = Math.round((data.portions || []).reduce((s, p) => s + p.protein_g, 0) * 10) / 10; ... {(Math.round(p.protein_g * 10) / 10)}g

P2_LockMeal_button_disables.fix_applied: locked state added, button disabled after click, shows loading state

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 reported bug fixes have been correctly implemented in the code
CollapsedBadge now properly receives fullData prop for budget badge display
ProductCardGrid implements proper SWAP logic (max 1 per category) with 'Pick 1' labels
Both 'Select These' and 'Lock Meal' buttons now properly disable after click to prevent double submission
All protein displays now use proper rounding to avoid floating-point display issues

success_rate.frontend: 100% - UI loads correctly, code fixes verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 code fixes verified through code review. Functional testing blocked by external n8n webhook API dependency. To fully validate fixes in action, would need either mocked API responses or functional n8n webhook.

rca_of_issue.all_fixes_verified: All 5 reported bug fixes have been correctly implemented in the code at the specified locations. The changes match the expected fix patterns documented in iteration_1.json action items.
